title: Right Click and Milk (A Farmer's Delight Add-on)
description: An addon mod for Farmer's Delight that makes it easier to collect milk with glass bottles!
body:
![The whole image is in pixel art style. On the left side, there's a wooden sign with bottles: an empty Glass Bottle pointing to a Milk Bottle. On the right side, a long wooden banner displays the text “Right Click and Milk” in a pixel font.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/050a709173650e0bcb209a45fedea6fa0f7808a1.png)
**Right Click and Milk** is a simple mod addon for **Farmer's Delight** that makes collecting Milk a little easier.

With an empty Glass Bottle in hand, right-click a Cow, Goat or Mooshroom to receive a Milk Bottle in return.

No more going back and forth to grab buckets or crafting milk bottles at a table!

![GIF of Minecraft: A cow is surrounded by spruce fence. Player is in first person view, looking at the cow. With a empty glass bottle in right hand, he right clicks the cow and get a Milk Bottle](https://i.imgur.com/6RJJbLp.gif)
